creator: joe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

This is a very old problem report.  Does the problem still exist? 
If it does please upgrade to RELENG_4 (or 4.9-STABLE) and see if the problem 
still exists.  If it does please try the patch at http://www.josef-k.net/freebsd/ 
and see whether that fixes the problem.
